org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation

Class AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation.AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    BitmapDecorationCreationMode, EllipseDecorationCreationMode, RectangleDecorationCreationMode, TextDecorationCreationMode

    public abstract class AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode
extends ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create decorations based on the drawing of a rectangle.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Mahdi HANNOUN
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode

        public AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode(boolean persistent,
                                         ActionModeManager<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color> modeManager)
        Construct a new AbstractDecorationCreationMode with the given parent.
        Parameters:
        persistent - indicates if the mode is persistent or not.
        modeManager - a reference to the ModeManager that contains this Mode.

      • AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode

        public AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode(boolean persistent)
        Construct a new AbstractDecorationCreationMode. The ActionModeManager should be set before using this object.
        Parameters:
        persistent - indicates if the mode is persistent or not.
